message:
refactor(observability): migrate to ShardedObservability pattern

Update src modules to use the new ShardedObservability pattern for
per-task observability state creation:

- scope.rs: simplify observability state initialization
- obligation_leak.rs: use sharded observability for leak detection
- runtime.rs: major refactor to leverage ShardedObservability
- lyapunov.rs: use shared observability config
- diagnostics.rs: use sharded collector

This consolidates observability initialization logic and reduces code
duplication across the codebase.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
